name: elvin-studio
description: Elvin Studio — the authoring workspace for the Elvin narrative-game engine

scripts.wasm: cd ../tools/lvnconv && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -o ../../panel/public/lvns.wasm ./wasm && cp ../../panel/public/lvns.wasm ../../panel/public/play/lvns.wasm
scripts.deploy: npm run build && rm -rf ../server/website && mkdir -p ../server/website && cp -r dist/* ../server/website/
